ogTitle: Boomanoomana vs Boomerang Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boomanoomana and Boomerang Beach.
heading: Boomanoomana vs Boomerang Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boomanoomana, New South Wales and Boomerang Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boomerang Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Boomanoomana (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boomanoomana or Boomerang Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boomanoomana has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Boomerang Beach scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boomanoomana scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Boomerang Beach scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boomanoomana or Boomerang Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boomerang Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
